details: All 1st to 4th Job skills can be maxed
Put one SP into each skill first and then max each skill in this order
For any skills that have prerequisites, follow them first before following build path

nodes: <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/shinsoku.png} tip={Shinsoku / Akatsuki Trace (4th Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/falcons-honor.png} tip={Falcon's Honor (Hyper Skill)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/mist-slash-mastery-iii.png} tip={[Shinsoku] Mist Slash / Blade Flash (4th Job)}>

<tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/hitokiri-hundred-strike.png} tip={Hitokiri Hundred Strike / Summer Rain (4th Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/sudden-strike.png} tip={Sudden Strike (4th Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/noble-sword.png} tip={Hitokiri Strike (4th Job)}>
notes: Any combination of these skills are good but preferred from same category as you want to max primary first
The last skill from the Secondary Trio can be any skill of your preference
4 Boost Nodes total are needed to reach Master Level 60 for these skills (with Matrix Points used)<bp_Nodes with the same Main Skill (skill at the top) cannot be equipped at the same time_>

credits: Inner Ability + Hyper Passive Build + Boost Nodes

primary.name: Natural Talent
primary.shortDesc: Permanent Speed Increase 20, Maximum Speed 165, Jump 10, Katana Mastery Increase: 80%, Willpower: 30

primary.name: Return of the Five Planets
primary.shortDesc: Returns you to Momijigaoka upon use.\nCooldown 600 sec

primary.name: Hero's Echo
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, increases Attack Power & Magic ATT by 4% for 2400 sec\nCooldown: 300 sec
details: To obtain this skill, complete the quest <link href={https://maplestorywiki.net/w/Quests/57/A_God_Among_Horses} title={"A God Among Horses"}>

primary.name: [Shinsoku] Mist Slash
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 5
1st Hit - Damage: 120%, Max Enemies Hit: 4, Number of Attacks: 3
2nd Hit - Damage: 120%, Max Enemies Hit: 4, Number of Attacks: 3
3rd Hit - Damage: 120%, Max Enemies Hit: 4, Number of Attacks: 3

primary.name: [Shinsoku] Grazing Cut
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 8, Damage: 75%, Max Enemies Hit: 4, Dashes forward.

primary.name: Battoujutsu Dash
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 10. Allows you to jump a greater distance.
details: Can be assigned a Key Slot or activated by pressing jump twice

primary.name: Aoryu
primary.shortDesc: Permanently increase STR by 30 and DEX by 30.

primary.name: Mist Slash Mastery
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 9
1st Hit - Damage: 180%, Max Enemies Hit: 5, Number of Attacks: 4
2nd Hit - Damage: 180%, Max Enemies Hit: 5, Number of Attacks: 4
3rd Hit - Damage: 180%, Max Enemies Hit: 5, Number of Attacks: 4

primary.name: [Shinsoku] Countercurrent Slash
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 14, Damage: 210%, Max Enemies Hit: 1 Number of Attacks: 4

primary.name: [Battou] Crossing Draw
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 12, Damage: 100%, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Jumps during attack

primary.name: Mushin
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 11, Duration: 200 sec

primary.name: Akatsuki Samurai
primary.shortDesc: Critical Rate: +40%, Critical Damage +30%

primary.name: Indomitable Vanguard
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 55, Damage: 170%, Number of Attacks: 3, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Enemies are launched into air when they are hit.

primary.name: Identify Weakness
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 40, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 170%, Number of Attacks: 6

primary.name: Polished Form
primary.shortDesc: Max HP/Max MP: +20%, Physical Attack: +15, Speed: +20, Jump: +10

primary.name: Mist Slash Mastery II
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 13
1st Hit - Damage: 260%, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Number of Attacks: 4
2nd Hit - Damage: 260%, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Number of Attacks: 4
3rd Hit - Damage: 260%, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Number of Attacks: 4
Required Skill: Jin [Shinsoku] Mist Slash Lv. 20+

primary.name: Reactive Focus
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 14, Damage: 270%, Max Enemies Hit: 1 Number of Attacks: 5

primary.name: [Battou] Dark Moon Cut
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 31, Max Enemies Hit: 10, Damage: 210%, Number of Attacks: 6

primary.name: [Shinsoku] Crescent Moon Cut
primary.shortDesc: Active Effect: MP Cost: 33, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 380%, Number of Attacks: 3, Critical When Combined with Shouryuusen: 100%

primary.name: [Shinsoku] Stormcloud Splitter
primary.shortDesc: Attack Boost Chance: 90%, Evasion: 35%, Damage: +6%. Damage Boost can be stacked 5 times.

primary.name: Hitokiri Hundred Strike Legacy
primary.shortDesc: Status Chance: 30%, 190% damage every 1 sec, Duration: 6 sec

primary.name: Endless Rain
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 15, Damage: 210%, Max Enemies Hit: 6 Number of Attacks: 4

primary.name: Warrior's Heart
primary.shortDesc: Chance: 40%, HP Recovered: 4%
primary.desc: Critical hits have a chance to recover some HP

primary.name: Mist Slash Mastery III
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 13
1st Hit - Damage: 330%, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Number of Attacks: 4
2nd Hit - Damage: 330%, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Number of Attacks: 4
3rd Hit - Damage: 330%, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Number of Attacks: 4

primary.name: Noto
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 14, Damage: 340%, Max Enemies Hit: 1 Number of Attacks: 8

primary.name: [Shinsoku] Afterimage Slash
primary.shortDesc: Akatsuki Trace Attack Chance: 60%, Damage: 440%, Times Activated: 1

primary.name: Akatsuki Will
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, Removes all abnormal status effects, Cooldown: 360 sec
primary.desc: Removes certain abnormal status effects and become immune to Abnormal Status for a few seconds

primary.name: Akatsuki Warrior
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 70, Princess Sakuno appears\n[Passive Effect: All stats with a direct AP investment increase by 15%]
details: Skill is a passive, the active effect does nothing except displays an animation

primary.name: [Battou] Full Moon's Rage
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 18, Max Enemies Hit: 3, Damage: 1010%, Number of Attacks: 10. Cooldown: 15 sec.

primary.name: Noble Sword
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 142, Max Enemies Hit: 15, Damage: 670%, Number of Attacks: 8, Guaranteed Critical Attack, Critical Rate Increase: 45% for 40 sec, Invincibility: 3 sec\nCooldown: 120 sec

primary.name: Steel Resolve
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 48. While moving diagonally - Damage: 500%, Max Enemies Hit: 15, Number of Critical Attacks: 8\nYou can adjust the attack direction by holding the Up or Down Arrow key while pressing the skill key.\nCooldown: 6 sec

primary.name: Cleaver
primary.shortDesc: Defense Ignored: 35%, Damage: +30%

primary.name: Deflection
primary.shortDesc: Trigger Chance: 72% after avoiding an attack, Damage Reduction: 45%, Duration: 8 sec.

hyperActive.name: [Shinsoku] Silent Arc
hyperActive.shortDesc: MP Cost: 80, ATT +50 for 20 seconds, All abnormal status and elemental resistance increased by 100.\nCooldown: 60 sec.

hyperActive.name: Akatsuki Blessing
hyperActive.shortDesc: MP Cost: 200, Sword Energy: +100, Damage: 500%, Number of Attacks: 8, Max Enemies Hit: 14\nCooldown: 8 sec

hyperActive.name: Bushido
hyperActive.shortDesc: MP Cost: 80, Duration: 60 sec, Damage: +10%\nCooldown: 120 sec. Only applies to Sengoku classes within the party

fifthMain.name: Shogetsu Form
fifthMain.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 1000, Damage: 1950%, Number of Rush Attacks: 15, Enemies Hit: 14. Able to do 2 or more rush attacks on the same enemy.
Hayato's sword energy recovers by 1000 upon use.
Invincible during casting.
Cooldown: 120 sec

fifthMain.name: [Shinsoku] Crashing Tide
fifthMain.shortDesc:
Sword Energy Cost: 200, Successful hits grant a buff giving +23% Final Damage per stack for 40 sec.
1st Hit: Deals 330% damage to up to 15 enemies 15 times, activated 2 times.
2nd Hit: Deals 360% damage to up to 15 enemies 15 times, activated 2 times.
3rd Hit: Deals 390% damage to up to 15 enemies 15 times, activated 2 times.
4th Hit: Deals 410% damage to up to 15 enemies 15 times, activated 2 times.
5th Hit: Deals 450% damage to up to 15 enemies 15 times, activated 2 times.

fifthMain.name: [Shinsoku] Light Cutter
fifthMain.shortDesc:
Sword Energy Cost: 150, Max Enemies Hit: 10, Number of Attacks: 15, Damage: 380%, Attack Duration: 30 sec, Sword Energy Absorbed: 8 for each enemy defeated.
Deals 615% damage when attacking 1 enemy and absorbs 10 Sword Energy per attack
Before disappearing, deals a final blow that attacks up to 10 enemies 15 time(s) for 2000% damage, 6 time(s) and recovers Sword Energy. Max Sword Energy Recovered: 800
Cooldown: 120 sec.

fifthMain.name: [Battou] Wailing Heavens
fifthMain.shortDesc: MP Cost: 500. Stab enemies for 1100% damage 3 time(s). Number of Attacks: 10. Max Enemies Hit: 15.\nCooldown: 10 sec.

fifthBoost.name: Hitokiri Hundred Strike/Summer Rain Boost
fifthBoost.shortDesc: Hitokiri Hundred Strike/Summer Rain Final Damage: +420%

fifthBoost.name: Vapor Blade/Indomitable Vanguard/Identify Weakness Boost
fifthBoost.shortDesc: Vapor Blade/Indomitable Vanguard/Identify Weakness Final Damage: +180%

fifthBoost.name: [Battou] Dark Moon Cut/[Shinsoku] Crescent Moon Cut/Endless Rain Boost
fifthBoost.shortDesc: [Battou] Dark Moon Cut/[Shinsoku] Crescent Moon Cut/Endless Rain Final Damage: +120%

3rd Hit - Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 560%, Number of Attacks: 4

masteryCore.shortDesc: MP Cost: 14\nMax Enemies Hit: 4, Damage: 540%, Number of Attacks: 8

masteryCore.name: HEXA [Shinsoku] Crescent Moon Cut
masteryCore.shortDesc: MP Cost: 24, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 1330%, Number of Attacks: 13\nHEXA Shinsoku is prepared once every 10 sec, up to 3 total preparations

masteryCore.name: HEXA [Shinsoku] Silent Arc
masteryCore.shortDesc: MP Cost: 24, Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 1330%, Number of Attacks: 13\nHEXA Shinsoku is prepared once every 10 sec, up to 3 total preparations

MP Cost: 175, Max Enemies Hit: 15, Damage: 1270%, Number of Attacks: 8, Guaranteed Critical Attack, Critical Rate Increase: 45% for 180 sec, Critical Damage: +15%. Invincibility: 3 sec.
Cooldown: 120 sec.
------HEXA Hitokiri Strike (Angle)------
MP Cost: 80. While moving diagonally - Damage: 950%, Max Enemies Hit: 15, Number of Critical Attacks: 8
Cooldown: 6 sec

skillCore.name: Shin Quick Draw
skillCore.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 1200, invincible during casting
Activates 15 Chase Cuts that deal 720% damage to up to 15 enemies 15 times, then applies the Shin Quick Draw buff on Hayato for 10 seconds. Increases Hayato's Final Damage by 10% while buff is active.
1st/2nd/3rd Strike: Activates 5 Chase Cuts dealing 620% damage to up to 15 enemies 10 times. Recovers (100/150/200) Sword Energy when activated.
(Jin Blade Flash 1st-3rd Strikes can be used during some attack skills.)
Final Strike: Activates 10 Chase Cuts that deal 800% damage to nearby enemies 15 times, invincible during casting.
Cooldown: 360 sec.

skillCore.name: Fleeting Breath
skillCore.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 1000, Invincible during casting
Rains hail upon the enemy 12 times, dealing 8470% damage to up to 15 enemies 14 times
After a delay, a massive hail squall falls on enemies 12 times, dealing 7700% damage 15 times
Ignore Defense: +60%, Boss Damage: +40%, Critical Rate: 100%

notable.name: HEXA Mist Slash Mastery III - 6th Job

meta: Hayato is a STR warrior class part of the Sengoku. Hayato also has a secondary resource called Sword Energy which certain skills consume. With Sword Energy, you also gain bonus stats depending on the amount you have. Hayato also has two stances one for mobbing and one for bossing which you can switch between at anytime
